ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the student (e.g., student, instructor, admin) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the student account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the student account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the student account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor (e.g., instructor, admin) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the instructor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the instructor account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the instructor account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the instructor account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject area of the course (e.g., Digital Marketing, Data Science) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the course was last updated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the course (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolling in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the enrollment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the enrollment was last updated */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "points_possible" INTEGER /* Total points possible for the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the assignment */,
  "attachment_url" TEXT /* URL of any attachments related to the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment being graded */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student being graded */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade received on the assignment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was submitted */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the instructor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the grade was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the grade was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the message belongs to */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender (instructor or student) */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient (instructor or student) */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  "message_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "message_type" TEXT /* Type of message (e.g., announcement, private message) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the message (e.g., unread, read) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the message was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the message was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_messages_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_messages_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course material */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the material belongs to */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., video, reading) */,
  "material_url" TEXT /* URL of the material */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the material was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the material was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the material */,
  "attachment_url" TEXT /* URL of any attachments related to the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_materials_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student making progress */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is making progress in */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date the progress was recorded */,
  "progress_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of course completion */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the progress (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the progress entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the progress entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_progress_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_progress_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being reviewed */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student writing the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating (1-5 stars) for the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_reviews_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_reviews_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being rated */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student writing the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating (1-5 stars) for the course */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text review accompanying the rating */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_ratings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_ratings_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student earning the badge */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "badge_date" TEXT /* Date the badge was earned */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the badge is related to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the badge */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the badge was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the badge was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_badges_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_badges_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certificates" (
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certificate */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student earning the certificate */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the certificate was earned for */,
  "certificate_date" TEXT /* Date the certificate was earned */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the certificate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the certificate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the certificate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certificate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificates_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificates_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
